text:
> >Synopsis:       apache crashes when using the php4 dso

[...]

> >Release:        4.1.1-RELEASE

> FreeBSD gate.logicnet.ro 4.1.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 4.1.1-RELEASE #2: Wed Oct 11 
> 13:53:36 EEST 2000     root@gate.logicnet.ro:/usr/src/sys/compile/GATE  i386

> >Description:
> When installing the php4 module, apache is crashing at startup.
> I have tried the apache132+php4 installation both from the ports and by hand.
> The results where the same.

I can't reproduce this on two systems, both running 4.1.1-STABLE.

-Dominik
